pathways.name: SwiftUI Debut Path
pathways.description: Learn the brand-new declarative UI framework from the ground up. Start with the building-from-scratch demo, master the essentials, understand data flow, then explore preview-driven development and cross-platform reach.

pathways.name: Combine Framework Path
pathways.description: Master Apple's reactive programming framework. Start with the conceptual introduction (publishers, subscribers, operators), then go hands-on with practical patterns and SwiftUI integration.

pathways.name: Catalyst Migration Path
pathways.description: Bring your iPad app to the Mac as a first-class citizen. Cover the basics first (Xcode setup, framework differences), then go deep on Mac-style refinements like sidebars, NSToolbar, and menu bars.

pathways.name: iPadOS & Multi-Window Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new scene-based lifecycle and multiple windows on iPad. Modernize your bars, sheets, and presentations for iOS 13. Add desktop-class browsing and modern layout APIs.

pathways.name: Sign In with Apple Path
pathways.description: Adopt Apple's privacy-first authentication. Add the button, implement the QuickSignIn flow that resolves existing Apple ID + iCloud Keychain credentials, and handle credential state changes correctly.

pathways.name: RealityKit Introduction Path
pathways.description: Build your first AR app with the new high-level Swift framework above ARKit. Learn the entity-component-system model, anchors, scene management, then integrate ARKit 3 features like people occlusion and motion capture.

pathways.name: Dark Mode Adoption Path
pathways.description: Add Dark Mode to your iOS 13 app. Master semantic colors, materials, vibrancy, dynamic asset catalog images, and CGColor traps. Adopt SF Symbols for proper light/dark glyphs.

pathways.name: Modern Swift 5.1 Path
pathways.description: Master Swift 5 ABI stability, Swift 5.1 module stability, property wrappers, opaque return types, and modern API design principles. The language foundation under SwiftUI and Combine.

pathways.name: Performance & Launch Optimization Path
pathways.description: Hit the 400ms first-frame goal. Profile launch with the new Instruments template, instrument production with MetricKit, and add XCTest performance metrics to CI.

pathways.name: On-Device ML Path
pathways.description: Train models on Mac with Create ML, run them with Core ML 3 (now with on-device personalization), and use Vision/Speech for high-quality on-device perception that respects user privacy.

pathways.name: Background & Network Modernization Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new BackgroundTasks framework, support Low Data Mode in URLSession and Network framework, and add native WebSocket support to your app.

pathways.name: Core Data + CloudKit Path
pathways.description: Add transparent iCloud sync to a Core Data app with NSPersistentCloudKitContainer. Learn multi-store patterns, history tracking, and the NSFetchedResultsController + diffable data sources bridge.

pathways.name: watchOS 6 Independent Apps Path
pathways.description: Ship a watch app to the Watch App Store with no iPhone counterpart required. Use SwiftUI, networking, audio streaming, and extended runtime sessions correctly.

pathways.name: Core Haptics & Sensory Path
pathways.description: Design custom haptic + audio patterns with the new Core Haptics framework. Build engines, schedule transient and continuous events, and synchronize with audio.
